title: Verification Result
description: Normalized verification outcome for HITL Protocol v0.8. Raw provider payloads must not be returned here.

satisfied.description: Whether the declared verification policy was satisfied.

proof_type.description: Normalized proof type that was accepted.

provider.description: Provider that produced the accepted evidence.

assurance_level.description: Service-defined assurance level after provider verification.

bound_to_case.description: Whether the service verified binding to the HITL case_id.

bound_to_action.description: Whether the service verified binding to the submitted action.

fresh.description: Whether the evidence satisfied the service freshness window.

single_use_enforced.description: Whether the service enforced single-use semantics for the accepted evidence.

verified_at.description: Timestamp at which the provider verification result was accepted.

verified_evidence.description: Normalized accepted evidence only. No provider proof material or secrets.

missing_requirements.description: Human-readable identifiers for requirement branches that were not satisfied.
